Notes: 9th Annual Starters Moravian Winter Classic First Round Game
Gwynedd-Mercy advances to the championship game on Sunday at 3:30 p.m. while
Ramapo will play in the consolation game at 11:00 a.m.
Game.Officials: Joseph Moser (R),  Rob Bosak (U1),  Lindy McQuown (U2)
